summary: On 8/2/20, at 2017 hours, AST responded to a domestic disturbance on South Hood Court in Wasilla. The investigation revealed the A.L. (age 17) had assaulted her mother by punching her three or four times, which caused pain. During the investigation, an intoxicated A.L. assaulted a Trooper was kickin...
